notes: Plain flat table at /finance/debts: дата проекта первая колонка (default DESC), no client grouping, V2 actions [₽ Оплатить] + [✏️] + [⋯].

Backend: ClientDebtProject extended with startDate/endDate/clientName/clientId/finalAmount/amountPaid/paymentCount. Sort enum extended with startDate/status. _count filter excludes voided + refund payments.

Frontend: full /finance/debts rewrite. New BookingPaymentsModal for ⋯ → Список платежей. Per-client chips strip, KPI strip, status filter pills, mobile sort <select>, mobile cards with 44px touch targets.
Standard PAR: technical REQUEST_CHANGES (HIGH math bug + dead code) + product NEEDS_FIXES (mobile menu broken + получено wrong) — 7 fixes in de391a9.
User 4-agent QA: A NEEDS_FIXES (получено для OVERDUE / paymentCount inflate), B 92% fidelity (mobile sort missing, mobile grid), C PASS (cosmetic only). D applied 9 fixes in c6e7fa0.
Final gates: tsc clean api+web; 873 API tests + 256 web tests all green.
